detection_questions.text: How long were you / have you been with this person?
Do you live with them / did you live together?
Is the relationship / was it exclusive?

single.text: Are you actively looking for a serious relationship or keeping things casual?
How often do you feel comfortable sharing your real feelings with this person?
How often do you get clear plans (dates, next steps) from them?
How well do your life goals (kids, career, living place) match?
Has this person shown repeated honesty and openness?
How often do you have deep conversations (not small talk)?
How calm/healthy are the arguments (do they end with understanding)?
Do they introduce you to close friends or family?
How comfortable do you feel with physical/romantic chemistry?
Have you seen controlling or jealous behavior?
Do you feel that this person supports your personal growth (work, hobbies, friends)?
How often does this person make plans with you that you enjoy?
Have you ever felt disrespected (comments, actions) in this relationship?
If you could read their mind right now, what would scare you most to discover?

options.label: They're comparing me to their ex
They're not as interested as they seem

single.text: How clear are you about what you want next from this relationship?
How often do you feel heard when you ask for change or help?
How honest do you feel their future talk is (plans, marriage, kids)?
How often do they show appreciation or small gratitude?
Have you noticed repeated patterns from past dates (same issue repeating)?
What is the main thing you want from this relationship next?

committed.text: How often do you talk about important topics (money, children, career)?
How do you normally resolve arguments?
Is household work shared fairly?
How often do you feel emotionally supported during hard times?
How often do you have time together (date night / shared activity)?
How often do financial disagreements cause stress?
Do you trust your partner with important secrets / boundaries?
When you're alone, what's your most honest feeling about your partner?

options.label: Deep gratitude - I'm lucky to have them
Uncertainty - wondering if this is right
Frustration - they're not who I thought

committed.text: Are your life plans (kids, location, career tradeoffs) on the same page?
How open are you about money and debts?
When one of you is stressed, how does the other react?
Have there been trust breaks (secrets, cheating) in this relationship?
How often do you make decisions together?
How comfortable are you asking for change (and seeing it happen)?
How satisfied are you with physical/romantic life?
Do outside family/friends often interfere in your decisions?
How satisfied are you with sexual frequency/quality?
Do outside family/friends often interfere in your decisions?
How well do you support each other's career goals?
What is the single biggest thing you want to improve?

engaged.text: How aligned are you on having children (timing, number)?
How do you handle wedding planning stress?
How do your families influence your decisions?
Are finances (savings, debt) discussed openly?
Do you agree on living location after marriage?
How often do you check in about long-term goals?
Do you feel your partner respects your family or cultural needs?
How do you plan childcare/parenting roles?
How often do you feel understood in goals for career + relationship balance?
Have you discussed long-term finances: joint savings, retirement?
What's your darkest fear about getting married to them?

options.label: We'll become boring and lose our spark
They'll stop trying to impress me
I'll discover something that changes everything

engaged.text: How comfortable are you asking about sensitive topics (in-laws, sex, money)?
Are you both getting pre-marital advice / counseling?
How often do arguments turn to long-term doubts?
Do you feel your partner's family will accept you?
How confident are you that both of you will keep working on the relationship after marriage?
How well do you handle stress together as a team?
How aligned are you on personal values and beliefs?
How do you handle disagreements about the wedding planning?
What is your biggest worry about marriage?

married.text: Do you feel your relationship has grown positively over time?
How fair is the division of household and parenting work?
How often do you feel physically or emotionally close?
Do you have shared hobbies or interests now?
Have you forgiven big hurts and healed properly?
If you could restart your life, would you choose this same person?

options.label: Probably not, but I'm here now

married.text: How open are you about money, retirement, big purchases?
How do you manage parenting stress together?
Have you kept romance alive (small gestures, dates)?
How often do you talk about your future goals (10 years)?
Are there unresolved secrets affecting trust?
How well do you share emotional labor (scheduling, school, health)?
Do you have individual time and support for interests outside family?
Have there been instances of controlling or abusive behaviour?
How satisfied are you with sexual frequency/quality?
How often do you plan for retirement, health care, long-term care?
How well do you balance couple time vs individual time?
How do you handle extended family relationships together?
How do you maintain excitement and novelty in your relationship?
What would improve your daily married life most?

recently_ended.text: Who ended the relationship?
How long since the breakup?
What was the main reason?
Was communication a major issue?
Did trust break (cheating, lies)?
After breakup, how often do you have contact with them?
How much do you think about them daily?
Do you feel safe now (physically / emotionally)?
Do you regret the breakup or want to reconcile?
Have you learned clear lessons about what went wrong?
Are you taking steps to feel better (therapy, friends, new hobby)?
Is the breakup affecting your daily function (work, sleep, eating)?
Did you notice patterns repeated from past relationships?
Did either of you use controlling or gaslighting behavior?
Are you ready to date again (emotionally)?
Have you reflected on your role in the breakup?
How do you feel about dating again in the future?
How has your support system been during this time?
How confident do you feel about your ability to have healthy relationships in the future?
What will help you move on?

cheating_branch.text: How did you discover the truth?
